title: China Labels Japanese JMSDF Warship Transit of Taiwan Strait a 'Provocation'
detail: China's military condemned the passage of a Japanese Maritime Self-Defense Force warship through the Taiwan Strait, calling it a 'provocation' and escalating diplomatic tensions with Tokyo. The incident adds a new dimension to cross-strait tensions as Japan asserts freedom of navigation alongside the United States.

media.caption: Chinese military labels Japanese warship transit of Taiwan Strait a provocation
